name: tutor-contrib-harmony

metadata.name: tutor-contrib-harmony
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Affero General Public License v3
metadata.summary: multi instance k8s plugin for Tutor

documentation:
This is a plugin for Tutor to make it easier to deploy multiple Tutor instances
onto a single cluster. This disables the use of Caddy as an external endpoint
and instead uses it only for per-instance routing. An Ingress is used to
automatically register each Open edX instance with a central NGINX load
balancer that routes traffic for the whole cluster.

functions.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.commands.create_elasticsearch_user
documentation: Creates or updates the Elasticsearch user

functions.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.commands.create_opensearch_user
documentation: Creates or updates the Opensearch user

classes.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.elasticsearch.ElasticSearchAPI
documentation:
Helper class to interact with the ElasticSearch
API on the deployed cluster.

classes.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.opensearch.OpenSearchAPI
documentation:
Helper class to interact with the OpenSearch
API on the deployed cluster.

classes.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.base.BaseSearchAPI

methods.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.base.BaseSearchAPI.run_kubectl_command
documentation: Invokes a kubectl command in a pre-defined namespace.

methods.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.base.BaseSearchAPI.run_curl_command
documentation:
Invokes a curl command on the first HarmonySearch pod.

If possible returns the parsed json from the HarmonySearch response.
Otherwise, the raw bytes from the curl command are returned.

methods.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.base.BaseSearchAPI.get_cluster_password
documentation:
Returns the search admin password for the cluster.

Read the kubernetes opaque secret and return the value at the given
`field` from the `secret_name`.

methods.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.base.BaseSearchAPI.get
documentation:
Runs a GET request on the HarmonySearch cluster with the specified
endpoint.

If possible returns the parsed json from the HarmonySearch response.
Otherwise, the raw bytes from the curl command are returned.

methods.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.base.BaseSearchAPI.post
documentation:
Runs a POST request on the HarmonySearch cluster with the specified
endpoint.

If possible returns the parsed json from the HarmonySearch response.
Otherwise, the raw bytes from the curl command are returned.

methods.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.harmony_search.base.BaseSearchAPI.put
documentation:
Runs a PUT request on the HarmonySearch cluster with the specified
endpoint.

If possible returns the parsed json from the HarmonySearch response.
Otherwise, the raw bytes from the curl command are returned.

Helper class to interact with the HarmonySearch
API on the deployed cluster.

functions.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.plugin.is_plugin_loaded
documentation: Check if the provided plugin is loaded.

functions.name: tutor_k8s_harmony_plugin.plugin._add_forum_env_vars
documentation:
Override forum env vars to configure the search cluster.

The default Elasticsearch configuraiton does not allow HTTP auth or CA
cert path configuration. This needs to be done through overriding the
default env values.
